top_patterns.description: Starts with a brief mention of an activity, event, or moment.
example_quotes: Beach days with my best friend forever :)
First BBQ lesson with @bbqrescues , scroll to enjoy the process and see finished product!!!! Mmmmm

top_patterns.description: Includes thanks or recognition for people, moments, or achievements.
example_quotes: Thanks @pbonfante for introducing summit and me to your tradition of the 10k Christmas run. We had a blast !
Congrats spencer on @theunlikelyflorist and bringing a little more joy to our weekend. Bravo!

top_patterns.description: Includes slang, exclamations, or energetic phrases.
example_quotes: Killer hike down to CO river.
Beach days with my best friend forever :)
Thanks @pbonfante for introducing summit and me to your tradition of the 10k Christmas run.
Congrats spencer on @theunlikelyflorist and bringing a little more joy to our weekend.
Killer hike down to CO river.

language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often under 10 words, with occasional longer reflections.
language_habits.line_break_style: Mostly continuous, minimal line breaks; occasional line breaks for emphasis or separation.

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Creates an approachable, energetic vibe that invites engagement.
example_quotes: Killer hike down to CO river.

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Builds connection through sharing personal moments or gratitude.
example_quotes: Thanks @pbonfante for introducing summit and me to your tradition of the 10k Christmas run.
Congrats spencer on @theunlikelyflorist and bringing a little more joy to our weekend.

anti_patterns: Lack of personal voice or emotion

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake's current Instagram voice is casual, energetic, and personal, emphasizing moments, gratitude, and enthusiasm.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shifted from more formal or promotional to more personal and spontaneous expressions.
